subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, open thy hearing ear and hearken unto the counsels of 'Abdu'l-Bahá. In this mortal world, the fruit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی گوش شنوا بگشا و نصیحت عبدالبهاء بشنو در این دار فانیه ثمره و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
